Document:
# 0 Don’t Be a Jerk
Take these rules as they were intended, not just as they are written. Circumventing the rules and legal loopholes may also result in a ban at the administration’s discretion.
# 1. Unfair Play
The use of cheats, macros, and exploits to gain an advantage in the game is STRICTLY prohibited. If you gained an advantage accidentally, simply report it to AHELP; otherwise, it will be considered a violation of this rule.
# 2. No sexual content
Erotic Role Play (ERP) and sexual content are strictly prohibited. Romantic relationships are allowed (no further than hugs and kisses), but must not interfere with other players.
# 3. Do not incite OOC hatred Comments containing hate speech, insults, or displays of intolerance toward other players are not permitted. This applies to OOC communication, not IC character interactions.
- Deliberate attempts to humiliate others based on their nationality, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, or other characteristics are not permitted. - Words that are closely associated with insults in real life are not permitted. - The fact that this is permissible in your region or that you consider it permissible is NOT a valid excuse. - Discussion of religion and politics is prohibited.
# 4. Stay in Character Do not step outside the boundaries of your character’s role or the world’s setting.
- Do not use real-world words that make no sense within the game. - Inappropriate and offensive behavior is punishable.
